Test Case: User can register with valid invite code
Steps:
1. Go to https://shaamelz.com/app/auth.html
2. Click Register tab
3. Enter: Name, Email, Password (6+ chars)
4. Enter valid invite code
5. Click Create Account
Expected Result:
Account created successfully
Redirected to dashboard
Email confirmation sent (if enabled)

Steps:
1. Go to registration page
2. Leave invite code blank
3. Try to submit

1. Enter invalid email format
2. Try to register

1. Enter password < 6 chars
2. Try to register

Test Case: User can login with correct credentials
Steps:
1. Go to login page
2. Enter registered email & password
3. Click Sign In
Expected Result:
Login successful
Redirected based on role:
- Admin → Company Dashboard
- Rep → CRM or Sales OS

Steps:
1. Enter correct email
2. Enter wrong password
3. Try to login

1. Enter email not in system
2. Try to login

1. Login
2. Click user menu
3. Click Sign Out
Expected Result:
Logged out
Redirected to login page
Cannot access protected pages

Test Case: Logged out users cannot access CRM
Steps:
1. Without logging in
2. Try to access /crm/index.html directly

1. Click Forgot Password
2. Enter email
3. Follow reset link in email
4. Enter new password
Expected Result:
Password updated
Can login with new password

Steps:
1. Login as super admin
2. Try to access all modules
Expected Result:
Can access:
- CRM
- Sales OS
- Admin dashboard
- User management
- Invoice generation
